Mad Egg Labs

Privacy Policy for Mad Egg Labs, Inc

Effective Date: May 1, 2026

No data collection

We do not collect, store, or share any personal information from our visitors. When you browse this site, you are completely anonymous to us. We do not track your IP address, your location, or your device information.

No cookies

We do not use cookies, pixels, or any other tracking technologies.

No third-party tracking

We do not use third-party analytics tools or advertising trackers that build profiles of your online activity.

External links

Our website may contain links to other websites. Please be aware that once you leave our site, Mad Egg Labs, Inc is not responsible for the privacy practices of those external sites. We encourage you to read their privacy policies.

Contacting us

If you choose to contact us via email, we will only use your email address to respond to your inquiry. We will never sell your contact information or add you to a marketing list without your explicit permission.

Changes to this policy

If we ever change how this site works, we will update this page. However, our core philosophy will always be to provide information, not collect it.

Please reach out to us at with any questions.

Copyright © 2026 Mad Egg Labs, Inc. All rights reserved. Privacy
